service.whyPacredTitle: Stuck at any Port or Terminal — Trust Pacred Shipping to Handle It All
service.reviewsTitle: Import, Export & Customs Clearance — Everything You Need, All in One Place
service.banner1Title: Order Worldwide with Pacred — Anywhere, Anytime
service.banner1Bullet1: End-to-end care from order to import
service.banner2Bullet3: Any checkpoint — we clear it all
service.aboutPara1L: Pacred Shipping — your end-to-end import-export and customs clearance specialist with over 14 years of experience. We handle every step from sourcing to delivery, all in one place. Whether you're sourcing from China or anywhere worldwide — 1688, Taobao, Tmall — we provide secure payment-transfer service with the best rates and full transparency.
service.aboutPara2L: If you already have goods to sell, whether you're an individual, a registered business, or an enterprise, we help you expand to overseas markets with full distributor and export services — managing documentation, logistics, and every step of the process for you.
service.aboutPara1R: On top of that, we have a professional Chinese-language interpreter team to help you contact, negotiate, and close deals with factories — free of charge. We cut your sourcing costs and guarantee the best prices, plus full Door-to-Door import service covering every step from sourcing, ordering, shipping, to customs clearance and final delivery.
service.aboutPara2R: Pacred is committed to service that's "fast, sharp, and never says 'can't be done'" — every step of the way. With a professional team of 14+ years of experience in import, export, customs clearance, and purchasing, we're ready to solve every problem for you.
service.feature1Desc: 1688, Taobao, Alibaba, Tmall — whatever store you order from, we verify and close every deal, with delivery guaranteed.
service.feature2Desc: Whether FCL, LCL, import-export, customs clearance, or stuck cargo — our quality team handles every step end-to-end with 14+ years of experience. Fast, sharp, never says 'can't be done'.
service.feature3Title: QC at Every Step — Quality Guaranteed
service.feature3Desc: Trust us — whether you're a small SME, mid-size, or large enterprise, we provide QC service at the warehouse to guarantee product quality.
service.feature4Desc: Slow imports? Cargo stuck at customs? Whatever the issue, we clear it — fast and decisive. Never 'can't be done'.
service.feature5Desc: Import with us today and get flat-rate ฿50 delivery across Bangkok and surrounding areas.
service.feature6Desc: Crystal-clear costs — every customer gets an SMS notification on every payment.

tos.title: Accept terms before continuing
tos.intro: By using Pacred services (import-export / shipping / customs clearance / China shopping cart), you agree to the following terms:
tos.item1: Registration data must be truthful — false data may result in account suspension.
tos.item2: Payments via the system must include valid transfer evidence within the stated time window.
tos.item3: Illegal / counterfeit / hazardous goods may be refused at our sole discretion.
tos.item4: Refunds and returns follow our published policy.
tos.item5: We reserve the right to amend these terms — new versions require fresh acceptance.
tos.fullTextLink: Full text at <link>/terms</link> — full version will be uploaded in Phase H (rebrand).
tos.agreeLabel: I have read and accept Pacred's <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

pricing.cargoNoticeDesc: Every shipment ships with proper docs, correct taxes, transparent and verifiable.
pricing.yiwuNote: China's largest small-commodity market — souvenirs, gifts, stationery, toys, home decor, party supplies, mom & baby.
pricing.guangzhouNote: South China's biggest fashion hub — clothing, shoes, bags, leather goods, cosmetics, accessories, auto parts.
pricing.shenzhenNote: China's technology hub — phones, computers, gadgets, drones, cameras, electronics & IT components.
pricing.lclSectionSub: Mid-volume — pay by CBM or kg, all-in DDP with customs cleared.
pricing.fclSectionSub: 20ft / 40HQ container — lowest per-unit cost, ideal for high volume.
pricing.lclNote: Best for small volumes that don't fill a container — shared shipments.
pricing.lclTruckNote: Best for urgent goods — door-to-door DDP from China to Thailand in 5-7 days.
pricing.lclSeaSubtitle: Sea freight from China · best value
pricing.lclSeaNote: Lowest freight cost, taxes & customs included. Best for non-urgent goods.
pricing.fcl20Note: Best for heavy goods at medium volume — most cost-effective per CBM.
pricing.fcl40Note: Best for large volumes — fully packed at lowest cost per unit.
pricing.footnote: * Starting rates per unit and may vary by product type, volume, and season — contact us, you may get a better rate than listed.

whyPacred.subtitle: China sourcing · QC · FCL/LCL freight · tax clearance · stuck-at-customs — Pacred Shipping handles it all, end to end.

whyPacred.f1Desc: No matter which shop you're buying from, we verify the seller, inspect the goods, coordinate, and close the deal — guaranteed delivery to your door.
whyPacred.f2Sub: Quality team with 14+ years of experience
whyPacred.f2Desc: FCL, LCL, import & export, customs and tax clearance, stuck-at-customs — our team handles every step. Fast, sharp, and we never say "can't be done".
whyPacred.f3Title: QC at every step — quality guaranteed
whyPacred.f3Sub: Inspect goods at the origin warehouse
whyPacred.f3Desc: Trusted by everyone from small SMEs to large enterprises. QC service at the warehouse guarantees quality before every shipment.
whyPacred.f4Sub: Fast, sharp — we never say "can't be done"
whyPacred.f4Desc: Late imports, goods stuck at customs — whatever the problem, Pacred Shipping handles it quickly and systematically.
whyPacred.f5Desc: Import with us today and enjoy flat-rate delivery from just 100 THB across Bangkok and nearby provinces — easier cost planning and savings.
whyPacred.f6Desc: Get SMS alerts for every payment — less confusion, transparent verifiable expenses on every bill and order.
whyPacred.articleP1Body1: brings the experience of an import & export specialist and full-service customs clearance for more than
whyPacred.articleP1Body2: , caring for you from upstream to downstream, finished in one place. If you need to buy products from China or anywhere worldwide —
whyPacred.articleP1Body3: — we're ready to handle your supplier payments safely, at great rates, transparent and verifiable.
whyPacred.articleP2Body1: On top of that, we have a professional Chinese interpreter team to contact, negotiate, and close factory deals for free — helping you cut your product cost. We'll get you the best price guaranteed, with full
whyPacred.articleP2Body2: import service, all steps included: sourcing, ordering, freight, customs clearance, and delivery to your hand.
whyPacred.articleP3: For those who already have goods — whether you're an individual, juristic person, or business owner — we can help you expand your market with our dealer and export service abroad. We handle all paperwork, logistics, and procedures end-to-end.
whyPacred.articleP4Prefix: Pacred focuses on service that is
whyPacred.articleP4Suffix: at every step, with a professional team of 14+ years experience — import, export, clearance, sourcing — we wrap up every problem for you.

whyPacred.articleP5Body2: take care of it, and you'll understand the meaning of
